about.title: About Škatula
about.p1: I grew up in Selca on the island of Brač, surrounded by Mediterranean nature — olive trees, almonds, carob, citrus, figs and lavender. Those scents, flavours and traditions shaped my approach to pastry-making and became the foundation of everything I create today.
about.p2: Over the years I have developed signature desserts inspired by local ingredients and Mediterranean heritage, blending tradition with modern pastry techniques. In every dessert I strive for balance of flavour, technical precision and a story that comes from the landscape that shaped me.
about.p3: From that idea came the concept of Škatula Mediterana — a collection of desserts inspired by the island of Brač and Mediterranean culture. Each product carries its own identity and interpretation of local flavours through a contemporary pastry expression.
about.p4: Zlatna Škatula is dedicated to the reinterpretation of classic Mediterranean and Dalmatian desserts. These are desserts that evoke nostalgia, yet leave an impression of contemporary elegance and exceptional craftsmanship.
about.p5: My goal is to create desserts that carry a piece of the Mediterranean through taste, connecting local identity, tradition and the art of contemporary fine pastry.
